title: RFP Record
description: A single Request for Proposal extracted from a pension plan document. Every record is provenance-linked to a source document, page number, and verbatim quote.

rfp_id.description: Deterministic 16-char hex hash of (plan_id, rfp_type, anchor_date, normalized_title). Recomputing this from any source document text produces the same id, so re-running the pipeline never duplicates.

title.description: Short human-readable name of the RFP, e.g. 'General Investment Consultant Search'.

release_date.description: Date the RFP was issued (ISO 8601 yyyy-mm-dd) or null if unknown.

asset_class.description: Asset class for Manager RFPs (e.g. 'Global Equity', 'Private Equity'). Null for non-Manager types.

incumbent_manager.description: Raw manager name as it appears in the source document. Entity resolution to a stable ID is deferred to a future task.

incumbent_manager_id.description: Always null in v1; placeholder for future entity resolution.

shortlisted_managers.description: Raw manager names of shortlisted/finalist firms. Empty array if not yet known.

awarded_manager.description: Raw manager name of the awarded firm, or null if not yet awarded.

url.description: Public URL of the source document.

page_number.description: 1-indexed page number containing the source quote.

source_quote.description: Verbatim passage from the source document that grounds this extraction.
